title: Gas Station
problem_statement: Find the starting gas station index from which you can complete the circuit given gas and costs.

examples.explanation: Start at station 3 to complete the circuit.

intuition: Make locally optimal choices that lead to global optimum.

approaches.name: Optimal Solution
approaches.description: A clean explanation of the optimal approach will be added here.
